mapper.insert: INSERT INTO novel_plan (plan_id, novel_id, total_volumes, chapters_per_volume, overall_outline, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{planId}, #{novelId}, #{totalVolumes}, #{chaptersPerVolume}, #{overallOutline}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE novel_plan SET total_volumes = #{totalVolumes}, chapters_per_volume = #{chaptersPerVolume}, overall_outline = #{overallOutline}, update_time = NOW() WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, plan_id, novel_id, total_volumes, chapters_per_volume, overall_outline, create_time, update_time FROM novel_plan WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
SELECT id, plan_id, novel_id, total_volumes, chapters_per_volume, overall_outline, create_time, update_time FROM novel_plan WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
